QF.id: VB Concept and Role of Mutual Fund_10

question.text: Which of the following is a key advantage of investing through mutual funds?

answer.text: Professional management — your money is managed by experienced fund managers
Guaranteed returns that are always higher than bank FDs
Zero risk of losing any money
Tax-free returns on all mutual fund investments

explanation.text: **The Logic:** One of the biggest advantages of mutual funds is professional management. A qualified and experienced fund manager researches the market, selects investments, and makes buy/sell decisions on behalf of all investors. Individual investors benefit from this expertise without needing to become market experts themselves. **The Trap:** Mutual funds do NOT guarantee returns, do NOT eliminate risk, and returns are NOT always tax-free. These are common misconceptions that must be corrected. **Cross-Exam Context:** This is also tested in Series V-A (MF Distributors) under advantages of mutual funds. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Professional management is your strongest argument with retired clients who say "I do not understand the stock market." Tell them: "That is exactly why mutual funds exist — experts manage your money so you do not have to become an expert yourself."
